title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 18 2023
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 18 2023
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 18 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 18/07/2023
DCE iron ore futures rose by 0.66% today, the main contract closed at 845.The traders' willingness to ship is general.The steel mills are active to purchase.The overall trading sentiment of the market is normal.PBF at Tangshan port deal 880 yuan/mt,increase 7-8 yuan/mt. Some futures companies have received notification from the Daishang Exchange that their supervision of iron ore holdings is becoming stricter. Today's speech at the regular meeting of the National Development market sentiment.
